memory_entries.text: Product SQLite dataset mapping: g1 is primarily Office Products (items_g1/fdbk_g1, price column prc), g2 is Electronics (items_g2/fdbk_g2, price columns prc integer and prc_usd real/list USD), g3 is likely Musical Instruments. Feedback tables join to items by ref_id; review rating column is rtg and review body is body.
